code:
def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    
    # Calculate OBV
    obv = ta.volume.OnBalanceVolumeIndicator(close=df['close'], volume=None).on_balance_volume()
    
    # Calculate Bollinger Bands
    bb = ta.volatility.BollingerBands(close=df['close'], window=params['bb_window'], window_dev=params['bb_dev'])
    lower_band = bb.bollinger_lband()
    upper_band = bb.bollinger_hband()
    
    # Calculate RSI
    rsi = ta.momentum.RSIIndicator(close=df['close'], window=params['rsi_window']).rsi()
    
    # Generate signals
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Long conditions: price below lower band, OBV rising, RSI oversold
    long_cond = (df['close'] < lower_band) & (obv > obv.shift(1)) & (rsi < params['rsi_lower'])
    
    # Short conditions: price above upper band, OBV falling, RSI overbought
    short_cond = (df['close'] > upper_band) & (obv < obv.shift(1)) & (rsi > params['rsi_upper'])
    
    signals[long_cond] = 1
    signals[short_cond] = -1
    
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: AUD/USD exhibits mean-reverting behavior when price reaches Bollinger Band extremes, confirmed by OBV divergence and RSI overbought/oversold conditions.
